title: atalantia surasiana
intro: Atalantia surasiana, also known as the 'Wild Atalanta', is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and fruits, which are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenes. The health benefits of Atalantia surasiana include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
